calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-27-2018 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-13-2018 Sustained
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Timothy Kirk, Esq. 415-851-9868 of Medina Seto Law Group for Defendant CSE INSURANCE GROUP.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Discussed. Defendant reports Plaintiff is in the hospital and cannot be present and that Plaintiff will get an attorney. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT CSE INSURANCE GROUP'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.

Defendant CSE Insurance Group's demurrer to the sole cause of action in the complaint is sustained without leave to amend. No opposition filed.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D302/HK)
